stemHtml: Which selection best describes the Point of Safe Return (PSR)? The furthest point along a planned route…

options.a: To which an aircraft can fly to the destination or back to the departure, with reserves intact.
options.b: To which an aircraft can fly to the destination or back to the departure, or alternate with no reserves intact.
options.c: To which an aircraft can fly to the destination or back to the departure, with no reserves intact.
options.d: To which an aircraft can fly to destination or back to the departure, or alternate with reserves intact.
